goal: Create a Shopify ecommerce operations growth system. It analyzes orders, products, traffic, and conversion data; diagnoses sales decline; recommends promotions; suggests product title optimization; writes email marketing copy; decides which actions need human confirmation; and outputs a weekly growth report. Decide whether this should be multi-agent.

params.goal: Create a Shopify ecommerce operations growth system. It analyzes orders, products, traffic, and conversion data; diagnoses sales decline; recommends promotions; suggests product title optimization; writes email marketing copy; decides which actions need human confirmation; and outputs a weekly growth report. Decide whether this should be multi-agent.

decision.reason: prefer local workflow_registry + recent successful runs + low dependency
